params.extra_check: CRITICAL: Capture the RAW response body of runInferenceTranscript. In DevTools Network tab, click the runInferenceTranscript request, go to Response tab, and copy the FULL response body text. Save the first 50 lines of the response body in the result notes. This is a NORMAL (non-blocked) request — Etap should NOT intercept (use innocent prompt). We need the exact NDJSON line format to reverse-engineer.

notes: Notion normal NDJSON body capture. Use innocent prompt to avoid blocking. Need raw response body to understand JSON Patch format for warning delivery.
